## Important Notice
*
From March 27, 2025, Welcome Suica will be sold at the following locations.
In principle, only one Welcome Suica can be sold to each individual.
* ・ JR EAST Travel Service Center
Narita Airport Terminal 1 Station, Narita Airport Terminal 2・3 Station, Haneda Airport Terminal 3 Station, Tokyo, Shibuya, Shinjuku, Ikebukuro, Ueno, Yokohama, Sendai
* ・ Welcome Suica vending machine
Narita Airport Terminal 1 Station, Narita Airport Terminal 2・3 Station, Haneda Airport Terminal 3 Station
* ・ JAPAN RAIL CAFÉ TOKYO
* ・ TAKANAWA GATEWAY Travel Service Center
We apologize for the inconvenience and appreciate your understanding.
*
You can check disaster information from here (Japan Tourism Agency)
[http://www.jreast.co.jp/e/pdf/disaster\_e.pdf](https://www.jreast.co.jp/e/pdf/disaster_e.pdf)
![You can check a suitable rail pass for your trip!](https://www.jreast.co.jp/multi/material/img/bnr/baloon_pass_search_pc.png)
[
![JR EAST Rail PASS Search](https://www.jreast.co.jp/multi/material/img/bnr/bn_pass_search.png)
Opens in a new window
](https://pass-search.jre-maas.com/#/)

[Ticket Exchange Refund Policy](https://www.jreast.co.jp/en/multi/ticket/changes.html)
## Convenient for travelers!
### Suica /smart card
A convenient smart card that allows you to ride trains and buses and even shop with a single tap.
[What's a Suica (IC Card)?](https://www.jreast.co.jp/en/multi/suica/)
![Suica Image](https://www.jreast.co.jp/multi/img/top/img_suica.png)
![Welcome Suica Image](https://www.jreast.co.jp/multi/img/top/img_welcomesuica.png)
### JR TOKYO Wide Pass
An attractive low price! Shinkansen from Tokyo to Karuizawa,
and unlimited travel on trains to popular destinations including Lake Kawaguchiko, Kusatsu, Nikko, and Izu.
[JR TOKYO Wide Pass](https://www.jreast.co.jp/en/multi/pass/tokyowidepass.html)
![JR Tokyo Wide Pass map image](https://www.jreast.co.jp/multi/img/top/img_map_tokyowidepass.png)
### N'EX TOKYO Round Trip Ticket
Great for trips between Narita Airport and Tokyo, allows direct access to the city.
[N'EX TOKYO Round Trip Ticket](https://www.jreast.co.jp/en/multi/pass/nex.html)
![TOKYO Round Trip Ticket Map Image](https://www.jreast.co.jp/multi/img/top/img_map_nextokyo.png)
